text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It all started when I got in touch with Ines Fujin's
mother after the Kikuka Sho.

text_block_list.name: Ines's Mother
text_block_list.text:
My twins are both saying that they want to attend
the Arima Kinen.

text_block_list.name: Ines's Mother
text_block_list.text:
I need to visit the hospital, and I've asked my
husband to accompany me. It really shames me
that we can't be there for our daughters...

text_block_list.name: Ines's Mother
text_block_list.text:
I want the three of them to get together again
and talk. Could I ask you to help out, Trainer?

text_block_list.name: Ines's Mother
text_block_list.text:
I'm so sorry for involving you in our family
affairs...
choice_data_list: It's fine. I'm happy to be of help.

text_block_list.name: Ines's Mother
text_block_list.text:
Thank you so much. Please take good care of my
daughters.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Judging from Ines Fujin's behavior and the way
her conversations with her sisters have gone up
until now...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It seems they're not quite understanding each
other properly. Having me there as a third party
might help them untangle the mess they've found
themselves in.

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
The train my sisters are on should be arriving
shortly.

text_block_list.name: Little Sister B
text_block_list.text: Hey, Big Sis! Hey, Trainer! Let's have fun today!

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: Polly, Cassie...

text_block_list.name: Little Sister A
choice_data_list: I'm sure we'll have a blast.

text_block_list.name: Little Sister A
text_block_list.text: ...Yes, thank you for accompanying us.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Despite the awkward vibe that hangs in the air,
we set out for Nakayama Racecourse, where the
Arima Kinen takes place.

text_block_list.name: Little Sister B
text_block_list.text: Whoa! It's way more like a festival this time!

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
Of course—this is the Arima Kinen! Let's hold
hands tightly so nobody gets separated.

text_block_list.name: Little Sister A
text_block_list.text: We're fine. You don't need to treat us like babies!

text_block_list.name: Little Sister B
text_block_list.text: Don't be like that, Cassie!

text_block_list.name: Little Sister A
text_block_list.text:
No! I don't want to listen to Big Sis anymore!
Hmph!

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
I'm sorry, Cassie. I caused you two a lot of trouble
because I was being selfish.

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
It's okay now, though, because I'll help get your
dreams back. You can rest easy knowing you'll be
able to restart your dance classes!

text_block_list.name: Little Sister A
text_block_list.text: That's not what I want! You're a big dummy!

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
Wait, Cassie! Where are you going? What are you
so angry about?!
choice_data_list: Maybe because you jumped to conclusions...

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: Huh?
choice_data_list: Let's find her and hear how she really feels!

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: Uh, right!

text_block_list.name: Little Sister A
text_block_list.text: P-please let me through! Erm, I want to get to the front!

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: That was Cassie's voice!

text_block_list.name: Flashy Part-Timer
text_block_list.text:
Oh, hey there, little one. Are you here to watch
Oguri's race too? You look super amped.

text_block_list.name: Girl with False Eyelashes
text_block_list.text:
Aww, and she looks just like Ines! What a cutie!
Hey, where's your mommy? Are you lost?

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: S-sorry about this! That's my little sister!

text_block_list.name: Flashy Part-Timer
text_block_list.text: Huh?! For real?! You're Ines's little sister?!

text_block_list.name: Girl with False Eyelashes
text_block_list.text:
Wow, it's crazy that you sisters all love racing! Is
your dream to grow up to be like your big sis?

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
No, no. She's got a real talent for dancing, so her
dream is to be—

text_block_list.name: Little Sister A
text_block_list.text: You're wrong!

text_block_list.name: Little Sister A
text_block_list.text: ...That's not it at all! My... my dream is...

text_block_list.name: Little Sister A
text_block_list.text:
To cheer as loud as I can for my big sis as she
finishes in first place!

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: Huh?

text_block_list.name: Girl with False Eyelashes
text_block_list.text:
...Ah, I get ya! Just watching Ines run really perks
me right up, too.

text_block_list.name: Flashy Part-Timer
text_block_list.text:
I know, right? I love watching her run so much
that it kinda turned my world upside down.

text_block_list.name: Flashy Part-Timer
text_block_list.text:
I never knew anything about racing before. I used
to just work, eat, and sleep. That was pretty much
my whole day!

text_block_list.name: Flashy Part-Timer
text_block_list.text:
I didn't have a goal or anything like that—just my
part-time gig. My life was totally boring.

text_block_list.name: Flashy Part-Timer
text_block_list.text:
But then I saw your big sis working her butt off at
that boring job. She had like this glowing aura!

text_block_list.name: Flashy Part-Timer
text_block_list.text: So I got a little interested and went to watch a race, just out of curiosity. And Ines was crazy fast!

text_block_list.name: Flashy Part-Timer
text_block_list.text:
She was, like, super-hyped right up until she
collapsed. After seeing that for the first time...

text_block_list.name: Flashy Part-Timer
text_block_list.text:
It made me feel like I should really go all out for
some kind of purpose. Ya know? Giving it
everything until I can't stand anymore.

text_block_list.name: Little Sister A
text_block_list.text:
I feel the same way! Seeing Big Sis run gives me
courage!

text_block_list.name: Little Sister A
text_block_list.text: That's why... I really, really love her running!

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: Cassie, I...
choice_data_list: Will you two tell us your dreams?

text_block_list.name: Little Sister B
text_block_list.text:
Me and Cassie just want to cheer for our big sis
when she races. Right?

text_block_list.name: Little Sister A
text_block_list.text: Right... That's why we decided.

text_block_list.name: Little Sister A
text_block_list.text:
We're going to take care of Mom and the house,
just like Big Sis did for us before!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
As expected of a race featuring Oguri Cap, the
Arima Kinen was an engrossing event. But on the
way home, Ines Fujin appears to be lost in
thought.
choice_data_list: What did you think of the race today?

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: Oh, um...

text_block_list.name: Little Sister B
text_block_list.text:
Oguri was amazing! But I wanna watch Big Sis race
next time!

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: ...Thanks, Polly.

text_block_list.name: Little Sister A
text_block_list.text: ...Um, Big Sis?

text_block_list.name: Little Sister A
text_block_list.text:
I want you to keep competing in heaps of races!
Seeing you run hard, smile, and take home first
place...

text_block_list.name: Little Sister A
text_block_list.text: That's the dream our whole family shares!

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: But, Cassie...
choice_data_list: Their dream is for you to run, Ines!

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: Their dream...
choice_data_list: And I feel the exact same way.
And I feel the exact same way.

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
I always thought my racing career was just a
selfish desire.

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
Listen, Cassie, Polly. Can I ask a favor of you
both?

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
Do you think you two could do your best to help
out around the house? That way, I'd be able to
enter more races.

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: Can I depend on you?

text_block_list.name: Little Sister A
text_block_list.text:
Yeah! If it means you'll get to compete more,
we'll do it!

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
It will. I'll be able to run my heart out, and enjoy
any race I enter.

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: Thank you both... truly.

text_block_list.name: Ines's Little Sisters
text_block_list.text: Hehe, no problem!
choice_data_list: It's time to run for everyone's dreams.

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: You got it, Trainer!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Ines Fujin and her sisters are illuminated by the
sunset over Nakayama Racecourse, where dreams
cross paths.
